title: Gravitational Waves: Linear Approximation Analysis
desc: Explores gravitational wave generation and detection using linearized Einstein equations and metric perturbations.
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework on Harmonic Oscillator and Double Pendulum
desc: Explores momentum-space Lagrangian for harmonic oscillator and Hamiltonian analysis of double pendulum with small-angle approximations.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs of canonical transformations using generating functions for various coordinate systems.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proving canonical transformations and Poisson bracket calculations in analytical mechanics problems.

title: Canonical Transformations in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Analyzes canonical transformations for anharmonic oscillators and action-angle variables in a tan² potential.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Lagrangian mechanics applied to spring-mass systems, sliding blocks, and conical motion problems.

title: Variational Calculus in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Using variational principles to solve optimization problems: shortest paths on spheres, minimal surfaces, and hanging chains.

title: Light Path in Exponential Atmosphere via Calculus of Variations
desc: Derives the trajectory of sunlight through an exponentially stratified atmosphere using variational principles and the Euler-Lagrange equation.

title: Central Force Problems in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Solving two central force problems: finding force for an Archimedean spiral trajectory and determining motion under inverse-cube gravity.

title: Scattering Cross Sections in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Calculates scattering cross sections for particles in a spherical potential well and for Rutherford scattering between two electrons.
